leadership.description: Led the Creativity Department (2024), overseeing design and branding for IEEE student branch events and coordinating creative teams for technical conferences and workshops.

I was a core member of the Department of Extracurricular Activities (DECA) at MSRIT and helped organize Karnataka Rajyotsava 2023 and 2024 as part of the creative team, and Udbhav 2024 as the Production Lead.
Part of the stage committee for a 3-day IEEE conference at MSRIT. Assisted with stage coordination, session hall management, and registration desk operations during the event.
Served as Vice Chair of the Creativity Department. Led design initiatives for the 'IEEE Odyssey 2023' event, including posters and creative installations such as themed photo booths.
